organic: Keep separate to avoid contaminating dry waste
ewaste: Do not bin with household waste
unsure: When unsure, keep aside and consult local guidelines

plastic: Use Chennai GCC dry-waste day for pickup
organic: GCC encourages home composting; avoid plastic liners
metal: Bundle metal cans; keep sharp edges covered
ewaste: Locate TNPCB/GCC authorized e-waste centers; avoid informal disposal
